name: Acme Marketing Site Refresh
description: Exploration of three hero treatments across two themes and two layouts for the Acme marketing site.

variants.name: Bold Hero
variants.description: High-contrast oversized hero headline with a single CTA.

variants.name: Story Hero
variants.description: Editorial layout leading with customer narrative.

variants.name: Product Hero
variants.description: Hero anchored around a product screenshot.

themes.name: Light
themes.description: Default light theme with neutral palette.

layouts.name: Split
layouts.description: Two-column split with content left, media right.
